title: Egyptian Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry dish, inspired by Egyptian flavors, made with rice and various vegetables. This meal is perfect for a weeknight dinner or lunch.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the shattering stir-fry vegetables and cook until tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together nutty brown rice vinegar, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the vinegar mixture over the vegetables and stir to combine.
Add the Egyptian rice to the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetables.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the rice is heated through.
